tools.name: get_checkout
tools.description: Returns details about the checkout, including line items, totals, and any applicable discounts or taxes.

meta.description: Metadata for UCP agent profile discovery.

profile.description: Agent profile URI for UCP discovery.

id.description: The ID of the checkout to update. Format: 'gid://shopify/Checkout/abc123'

tools.name: create_checkout
tools.description: Creates a checkout. Returns checkout details, including line items, totals, and any applicable discounts or taxes.

meta.description: Metadata for UCP agent profile discovery.

profile.description: Agent profile URI for UCP discovery.

instruments.description: Payment instruments for this checkout (e.g., credit cards, tokens, wallets).

id.description: A unique identifier for this payment instrument instance.

handler_id.description: Identifier of the payment handler that was used to generate this instrument.

type.description: Instrument type. Use 'card' for credit/debit cards, 'token' for wallet payments (Google Pay, Apple Pay).

street_address.description: Street address of the billing address.

extended_address.description: Extended address of the billing address such as an apartment number, C/O, or alternative name.

postal_code.description: Postal code of the billing address.

address_country.description: Country of the billing address in 2-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

first_name.description: First name of the contact associated with the billing address.

last_name.description: Last name of the contact associated with the billing address.

phone_number.description: Phone number of the contact associated with the billing address.

credential.description: Payment credential payload to process the transaction for this instrument.

type.description: Namespaced token type using dot notation (e.g., stripe.token, merchant.token, google.pay).

display.description: Display information for this payment instrument.

brand.description: Card brand (e.g., visa, mastercard). Required for card instruments.

last_digits.description: Last 4 digits of card. Required for card instruments.

expiry_month.description: Card expiry month (1-12). Required for card instruments.

expiry_year.description: Card expiry year. Required for card instruments.

rich_text_description.description: Rich text description of the payment instrument for display purposes.

rich_card_art.description: Rich card art URL or identifier for the payment instrument.

selected.description: Whether this instrument is the currently selected for the checkout.

line_items.description: Items to add to the cart or checkout. Required when creating a new cart or checkout.

id.description: The ID of the line item to update.
The Product Variant ID to add or update.

buyer.description: Information about the buyer including email and phone number.

context.description: Provisional context hints for localization and pricing. Used when authoritative data (e.g., shipping address) is missing; higher-resolution data supersedes these values and unsupported hints may be ignored without error.

language.description: Language tag in IETF BCP 47 format.

eligibility.description: Buyer claims about eligible benefits such as loyalty membership, payment perks, and similar.

items.description: Reverse-domain identifier. Must contain at least two dot-separated segments (e.g., 'com.example.loyalty').

attribution.description: Marketing attribution context for the buyer's session (referring domain, click IDs, UTM parameters).

referring_domain.description: Domain that referred the buyer to the merchant's storefront.

cart_id.description: Cart ID to convert to checkout. When provided, the business uses cart contents (line_items, context, buyer) and ignores overlapping fields in the checkout payload. Format: 'gid://shopify/Cart/abc123?key=secret'

line_item_ids.description: The line item ids to fulfill.

discounts.description: Discount or promo codes to apply to the cart. Only prompt if customer mentions having a discount code.

codes.description: Discount codes to apply. Case-insensitive. Replaces previously submitted codes. Send empty array to clear.

tools.name: update_checkout
tools.description: Updates a checkout. Returns checkout details, including line items, totals, and any applicable discounts or taxes.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get the details of an order

meta.description: Metadata for UCP agent profile discovery.

profile.description: Agent profile URI for UCP discovery.

id.description: The ID of the order. Format: 'gid://shopify/Order/123'

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description:
Search for products from the online store, hosted on Shopify.

This tool can be used to search for products using natural language queries, specific filter criteria, or both.
At least one of query or filters must be provided.

Results are paginated, with initial results limited to improve experience.
Use the pagination.cursor from the response to fetch additional pages when users request more results.

Response conforms to the UCP catalog search capability (dev.ucp.shopping.catalog.search).

meta.description: Metadata for UCP agent profile discovery.

profile.description: Agent profile URI for UCP discovery.

context.description: Buyer signals for localization and personalization.

address_country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

language.description: Language tag in IETF BCP 47 format.

categories.description: Category filters combined with OR logic.

min.description: Minimum price in minor currency units.

max.description: Maximum price in minor currency units.

available.description: Filter by availability. Default true (only sale-ready items).

tools.name: lookup_catalog
tools.description:
Look up multiple products or variants by identifier.
Use this tool to resolve multiple product/variant IDs in a single request.

Supports:
- Product IDs (gid://shopify/Product/...): Returns product with match: "featured"
- Variant IDs (gid://shopify/ProductVariant/...): Returns parent product with the exact variant

Results are grouped by product. Each variant includes an inputs array showing
which request ID resolved to it and whether the match was exact or featured.

Maximum 10 IDs per request.

meta.description: Metadata for UCP agent profile discovery.

profile.description: Agent profile URI for UCP discovery.

context.description: Buyer signals for localization and personalization.

address_country.description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

language.description: Language tag in IETF BCP 47 format.

categories.description: Category filters combined with OR logic.

min.description: Minimum price in minor currency units.

max.description: Maximum price in minor currency units.

available.description: Filter by availability. Default true (only sale-ready items).

tools.name: get_product
tools.description:
Retrieve complete product detail by identifier. Returns a singular product
with a relevant set of variants, exact pricing, and real-time availability.
Supports interactive option selection via selected and preferences parameters
for variant narrowing and availability signals. Use for product detail page
rendering and purchase decisions.

available.description: Filter by availability. Default true (only sale-ready items).
